# WeChat Cover Designer

Repository: https://github.com/tomorrow140/wechat-cover-designer

This is an agent-neutral tool for generating Chinese social media article cover images with a warm interview screenshot, deep black/brown gradient, solid heavy Chinese typography, and vivid lime editorial title style.

Primary usage:

```bash
python3 scripts/wechat_cover.py --input input.png --output cover.png --title "标题" --platform wechat
```

Important files:

- `AGENTS.md`: instructions for coding agents
- `CLAUDE.md`: Claude Code-specific notes
- `SKILL.md`: Codex skill metadata and workflow
- `scripts/wechat_cover.py`: CLI implementation
- `references/cover-style.md`: visual style guide

Output:

- `wechat`: 1645x700, 2.35:1
- `xiaohongshu`: 1200x1600, 3:4
